name: CARE
description: CAse REport guidelines for case reports.

items.title: Title
items.description: The diagnoses or intervention of primary focus followed by the words "case report".

items.title: Key words
items.description: 2-5 key words that identify diagnoses or interventions in this case report, including "case report".

items.title: Abstract
items.description: Introduction: What is unique and why is it important? The main symptoms and important clinical findings. Main diagnoses, therapeutic interventions, and outcomes. Conclusion — what is the main "take-away" lesson?

items.title: Introduction
items.description: Brief background summary of this case referencing the relevant medical literature.

items.title: Patient information
items.description: De-identified patient specific information; primary concerns and symptoms of the patient; medical, family, and psycho-social history including diet, lifestyle, and genetic information; pertinent co-morbidities and relevant interventions, including self care.

items.title: Clinical findings
items.description: Describe the relevant physical examination and other clinical findings.

items.title: Timeline
items.description: Important dates and times in the case (table or figure).

items.title: Diagnostic assessment
items.description: Diagnostic methods (e.g. PE, laboratory testing, imaging, surveys); diagnostic challenges; diagnostic reasoning including other diagnoses considered; prognostic characteristics (e.g. staging in oncology) where applicable.

items.title: Therapeutic intervention
items.description: Types of intervention (e.g. pharmacologic, surgical, preventive, self-care); administration of intervention (e.g. dosage, strength, duration); changes in intervention with explanations.

items.title: Follow-up and outcomes
items.description: Clinician- and patient-assessed outcomes (if available); important follow-up diagnostic and other test results; intervention adherence and tolerability (and how this was assessed); adverse and unanticipated events.

items.title: Discussion
items.description: A scientific discussion of the strengths AND limitations associated with this case report; discussion of the relevant medical literature; the rationale for conclusions (including assessments of cause and effect); the main "take-away" lessons from this case report.

items.title: Patient perspective
items.description: The patient should share their perspective or experience whenever possible.

items.title: Informed consent
items.description: Did the patient give informed consent? Please provide if requested.
